Lieutenant General Mohammed Ahmed Al Marri, Director General of the General Directorate of Identity and Foreigners Affairs Dubai (GDRFA Dubai), conducted an extensive inspection tour at Dubai International Airport on the first day of Eid Al Adha. The tour covered the arrival and departure halls across Terminals 1, 2, and 3, with the aim of directly assessing the smooth flow of operational procedures and engaging with frontline personnel on the ground. Accompanying His Excellency during the tour was Major General Obaid Meher bin Suroor, Deputy Director General of GDRFA Dubai, along with a delegation of senior officials from Dubai Police. @GDRFADUBAI | @DubaiPoliceHQ

Hamdan bin Mohammed: On the occasion of Eid Al Adha, warm congratulations to the leadership, the people of the UAE, and everyone who calls this generous nation home. May Allah Almighty bless this occasion with goodness, prosperity, love, and tolerance, and continue to bestow upon the UAE the blessings of security and prosperity. Wishing everyone a blessed and joyful Eid.
